data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of syncing back to the main booking system, but there is no evidence presented that confirms this functionality. The linked use case specifies the need for this sync, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate any API interactions or state checks that would indicate this requirement has been fulfilled. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the syncing process.
gaps: No evidence of syncing back to the main booking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for sync back to main booking system
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the booking data is correctly synced back to the main booking system after a booking is confirmed.
